title: NIMASA Opens First Maritime Museum in Nigeria. - FinancialEDGE
description: All is set for the official opening of the NIMASA MARITIME MUSEUM. The first Maritime Museum in Nigeria. While inspecting the museum this weekend, NIMASA DG Dr Bashir Jamoh noted that the museum will serve purposes such as archiving, Educating stakeholders and tourism for both local and international tourists
html:
All is set for the official opening of the NIMASA MARITIME MUSEUM. The first Maritime Museum in Nigeria.

While inspecting the museum this weekend, NIMASA DG Dr Bashir Jamoh noted that the museum will serve purposes such as archiving, Educating stakeholders and tourism for both local and international tourists
